name: baransu
description: バランス — governance skills that balance thinking and execution. Ships /think (align-research-approve before code), /review (multi-perspective isolated re-verification of model output), /analyze (goal-anchored spec builder for medium-to-large tasks), /dev (gate-enforced TDD executor for small tasks), /write (bilingual zh/en copywriting assistant with Refine and Generate modes), and /execute (TDAID orchestration engine — reads /analyze spec, drives parallel worktrees via agent-only skills, produces final-report.md).
